package rulefixtures

import (
	"context"
)

// scenario for repository_returns_gorm_query_builder: Repositories that return partially built `*gorm.DB` chains for callers to finish.
// fixture polarity: negative; family: architecture; severity: warning.
type Rule133NegativeRecord struct {
	TenantID string
	Limit int
}

type Rule133NegativeService interface {
	Run(context.Context, Rule133NegativeRecord) error
}

func scenario133Negative(ctx context.Context, service Rule133NegativeService, input Rule133NegativeRecord) error {
	if input.Limit <= 0 {
		input.Limit = 50
	}
	return service.Run(ctx, input)
}
